summary: Update mode testing complete. Verified SRD-only items database: 92 SRD-safe magic items now replace the 3000+ copyrighted items. All copyrighted content (Vecna items, DMG-sourced items, Death Tyrant monster) successfully removed. Quick Reference Items tab loads correctly with new database. GM Screen loads without errors. Campaign dashboard and login flow working.

srd_items_database.title: SRD-only items database
srd_items_database.details: itemsDatabase.js contains 92 SRD-safe magic items (potions, rings, wands, staffs, wondrous items, magic weapons/armor). No copyrighted content.
srd_items_database.evidence: grep found 0 matches for 'vecna', 'DMG', 'dungeon master' in itemsDatabase.js

no_vecna_items.title: No Vecna items in database
no_vecna_items.details: Searching for 'vecna' in Items tab returns 'Showing 0 of 92 items'
no_vecna_items.evidence: Test 'No Vecna items in database' passed

no_death_tyrant.title: Death Tyrant removed from monster database
no_death_tyrant.details: grep for 'death tyrant' in monsterDatabase.js returns no matches
no_death_tyrant.evidence: Command: grep -i 'death tyrant' monsterDatabase.js returned no results

quick_reference_items_tab.title: Quick Reference Items tab loads correctly
quick_reference_items_tab.details: Items tab shows 92 items with proper SRD items like Potion of Healing, Ring of Invisibility, Staff of the Magi
quick_reference_items_tab.evidence: Tests 'Quick Reference Items tab loads with SRD items', 'SRD Potions exist in database', 'Legendary SRD items exist' all passed

gm_screen_loads.title: GM Screen loads without errors
gm_screen_loads.details: All 9 GM Screen tabs (Combat, Location, NPCs, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes) visible and functional
gm_screen_loads.evidence: Test 'GM Screen loads without errors' passed

landing_page.title: Landing page loads correctly
landing_page.details: Landing page shows 'Rookie Quest Keeper' with 'Start Your Quest' CTA

login_flow.title: Login flow works
login_flow.details: Login with test credentials (lcblakey24@outlook.com) successful, redirects to dashboard

campaign_dashboard.title: Campaign dashboard loads correctly
campaign_dashboard.details: Dashboard shows campaign list, sidebar navigation, and all sections accessible

test_results.backend: Not tested - changes were frontend-only (itemsDatabase.js, monsterDatabase.js)
